text: Very nice and professional treatment. I would highly recommend anyone here.

translations.en: Very nice and professional treatment. I would highly recommend anyone here.
translations.sr: Veoma prijatan i profesionalan tretman. Toplo preporučujem svima.
translations.sr_cyrl: Веома пријатан и професионалан третман. Топло препоручујем свима.
translations.ru: Очень приятное и профессиональное лечение. Настоятельно рекомендую всем.
translations.de: Sehr nette und professionelle Behandlung. Ich würde es jedem empfehlen.
translations.tr: Çok güzel ve profesyonel tedavi. Herkese şiddetle tavsiye ederim.
